headline: T1 Energy (TE) Draws Bernstein Coverage As Patent Risk Meets US Factory Push
summary: Bernstein has initiated coverage on T1 Energy (NYSE:TE), drawing new attention to the stock. The report highlights an ongoing patent dispute with First Solar as a key legal overhang. Bernstein also points to T1 Energy's plans for a second US manufacturing facility focused on local sourcing. T1 Energy enters this new phase of coverage with its stock at $8.53 and a very large 1 year return, roughly 7x, alongside a 13.0% return over 3 years. Short term performance has been mixed, with the...
